feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

bullets: Today we're talking about macro policy, and I'm joined by Scott Bessett, hedge fund manager and policy adviser.
Scott Bessett, thanks for being here.
This episode is brought to you by Bloomberg.
